cards.back: A statistical method used to model the relationship between a dependent variable and one or more independent variables.
A type of regression analysis that assumes a linear relationship between the independent variables and the dependent variable.
A type of linear regression that models the relationship between multiple independent variables and a single dependent variable.
A type of regression analysis that models the relationship between independent variables and the dependent variable using a polynomial equation.
A type of regression analysis used for classification problems, where the dependent variable is categorical and can take on only two values.
